TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sqiy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 120 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 113 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sqiy hya' ga Cyasi. tay mkyahu' na Sqiy hya' ga Yuwhbun raka. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy qalang Sqiy ga ungat pqwasan biru. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕqij ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa juwħβun raka. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj qalaŋ s~ɕqij ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sqiy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 33 buwan, 120 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 113 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sqiy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Sqiy hya' ga Cyasi. tay mkyahu' na Sqiy hya' ga Yuwhbun raka. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy qalang Sqiy ga ungat pqwasan biru. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕqij ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjas~ɕi. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqij ħjaʔ ɣa juwħβun raka. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj qalaŋ s~ɕqij ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
